title: clinopodium congestum
intro: Clinopodium congestum, also known as Mountain Mint or New Zealand Mountain Mint, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is valued for its aromatic leaves and stems, which exhibit antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Clinopodium congestum are said to provide relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, while its essential oil is used to ease anxiety and promote relaxation. Clinopodium congestum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its beneficial compounds.
